description: WYSIWYG Markdown editor for VS Code with live preview, diagrams, and comparison mode
configuration.title: Anytime Markdown
configuration.fontSize.description: Font size in pixels for the editor. 0 uses the VS Code default.
configuration.editorMaxWidth.description: Maximum width of the editor content in pixels. 0 means no limit.
viewsContainer.title: Anytime Markdown
viewsWelcome.specDocs:
To manage spec documents, open a folder or clone a repository.
[Open Folder](command:anytime-markdown.specDocsOpenFolder)
[Clone Repository](command:anytime-markdown.specDocsCloneRepo)
